value.found_quote: MCP servers and hosted MCP tools | Attaching MCP-backed capabilities | [Integrations and observability](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/agents/integrations-observability#mcp)
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists "MCP servers and hosted MCP tools" as a configurable property on an agent, with the stated purpose of "Attaching MCP-backed capabilities." This directly substantiates the claim that OpenAI offers MCP servers and hosted MCP tools (AgentKit), and that agents can attach MCP-backed capabilities via these features. The page also reinforces this in the "When to split one agent into several" section, mentioning "a different tool or MCP surface" as a reason to split agents. The offering appears to be presented as a current, active feature (no preview/beta language is used).
